subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the birds warble sweetly, seized by the rapture of the Manifestation, yet the people perceive it not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه تغردت الطیور بما اخذها جذب الظهور ولکن الناس هم لایشعرون قد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
